title: Fallen Kingdoms
description: Explore massive cities and ruins with the Dungeons and Taverns mod. Use Spartan Weapons and Spartan Shields for overpowered weapons to hunt down mobs. Face almost a dozen new illagers with Illager Invasion, also bringing new items. Fly with Icarus's wings.
body:
* Using Icarus, craft powerful wings to explore the skies.
* Fend off improved zombies (zombies reworked), with a wide range of weapons from Spartan Weaponry.
* Face powerful new raids with Illager Invasion.
* Recruit armies of workers and fighters with Villager Recruits and Villager Workers.
